'''Snow demons''' were predatory creatures native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Toola/Legends|Toola]]. They hunted [[Mastmot/Legends|mastmots]] and were in turn hunted by [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphids]]. They had [[Color/Legends|white]] claws, large [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]], hairy wings, and long purple tongues.<ref name="AJ10" />

Snow demons flew via a series of tubular bladders that were filled with methane gas to provide lift. Their wings were used primarily for propulsion.<ref name="AJ10" />

{{Creature-stub}}
